title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 47
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a lost lunch box.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you finally find your lunch box? You looked everywhere before class this morning. || Man: Yes, but not where I expected. I checked the classroom, because I remembered using it there yesterday. || Woman: And did you try the playground? You said you went there afterwards. || Man: I did, but nobody had seen it. Then my friend sent me a message and said [1]I had left my lunch box on the shelf in the art room[/1]. I must have put it there without noticing. || Woman: What a relief. You will need it later. || Man: Exactly. I'll pick it up before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you finally find your lunch box? You looked everywhere before class this morning.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I checked the classroom, because I remembered using it there yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: And did you try the playground? You said you went there afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I did, but nobody had seen it. Then my friend sent me a message and said I had left my lunch box on the shelf in the art room. I must have put it there without noticing.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What a relief. You will need it later.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Exactly. I'll pick it up before lunch.

items.question: Where is the lunch box?
items.explanation: The speaker says they had left the lunch box on the shelf in the art room.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still going to go ice skating after school? I was looking forward to it. || Boy: I don't think so. The ice rink has a competition today, so that plan will not work today. || Girl: We could play basketball instead. That might be fun. || Boy: I checked, but the sports hall is being used for exams. My cousin had a different idea: [2]we are going to have a picnic by the river this afternoon[/2]. || Girl: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station? || Boy: Yes, at four o'clock. Then we can go together before dinner.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Are we still going to go ice skating after school? I was looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The ice rink has a competition today, so that plan will not work today.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: We could play basketball instead. That might be fun.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I checked, but the sports hall is being used for exams. My cousin had a different idea: we are going to have a picnic by the river this afternoon.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Yes, at four o'clock. Then we can go together before dinner.

items.question: What are the friends going to do?

options.B: Have a picnic by the river

items.explanation: The speaker says they are going to have a picnic by the river this afternoon.

items.context: You hear two students talking about the history trip.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you packed for the history trip tomorrow? I'm trying not to take things I will not use. || Man: Almost. I was going to bring a guidebook, but the teacher said we will not need that there. || Woman: What about a pencil case? Do we need that? || Man: Not this time. The message says [3]everyone needs to bring a packed lunch because the museum cafe will be closed[/3]. || Woman: Thanks for telling me. I will put it in my bag now. || Man: Good idea. We leave early, and there will not be time to go back home.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you packed for the history trip tomorrow? I'm trying not to take things I will not use.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Almost. I was going to bring a guidebook, but the teacher said we will not need that there.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about a pencil case? Do we need that?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not this time. The message says everyone needs to bring a packed lunch because the museum cafe will be closed.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Thanks for telling me. I will put it in my bag now.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good idea. We leave early, and there will not be time to go back home.

items.question: What should the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone needs to bring a packed lunch because the museum cafe will be closed.

items.context: You hear two people choosing food in a cafe.
items.audio_script: Boy: Have you chosen what to order for lunch? The queue is getting longer behind us. || Girl: Not yet. I considered the fruit salad, but I want a hot meal. || Boy: What about the sausage roll? It looks good today. || Girl: I thought about that too, but it is too greasy. I think [4]I'll have the mushroom pasta because it has just been cooked[/4]. || Boy: Good choice. I'll decide while you pay. || Girl: Fine. Let's find seats by the window before all the tables are taken. We still have time before class begins.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Have you chosen what to order for lunch? The queue is getting longer behind us.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Not yet. I considered the fruit salad, but I want a hot meal.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: What about the sausage roll? It looks good today.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I thought about that too, but it is too greasy. I think I'll have the mushroom pasta because it has just been cooked.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Good choice. I'll decide while you pay.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Fine. Let's find seats by the window before all the tables are taken. We still have time before class begins.

items.question: What food does the speaker choose?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses the mushroom pasta because it has just been cooked.

items.context: You hear two students talking about the reading club.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you see the message about the reading club this afternoon? I was going straight to the library. || Man: Do not go there, because it is closed for new shelves. The teacher cannot use that room today. || Woman: Oh. I heard some people were waiting by room six. || Man: That is wrong too, because a maths class needs it. The latest message says [5]we must meet in the study centre after lunch[/5]. || Woman: Thanks. I would have gone to the wrong place. || Man: I will tell the others before registration, so nobody misses the start.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you see the message about the reading club this afternoon? I was going straight to the library.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Do not go there, because it is closed for new shelves. The teacher cannot use that room today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Oh. I heard some people were waiting by room six.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That is wrong too, because a maths class needs it. The latest message says we must meet in the study centre after lunch.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Thanks. I would have gone to the wrong place.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I will tell the others before registration, so nobody misses the start.

items.question: Where should students go for the reading club?
items.explanation: The latest message says they must meet in the study centre after lunch.

items.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the science exhibition.
items.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to the science exhibition tomorrow? I thought you were going to catch the bus. || Girl: I was, but the road is closed near the centre, so it is not a good idea now. || Woman: Could you walk instead? It might be quicker. || Girl: I checked, but I have a large project to carry. [6]I'm taking the underground because the station is next to the building[/6]. || Woman: That makes sense. When will you arrive? || Girl: Just before ten. I will send you a message when I get there, and we can meet near the entrance.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: How are you getting to the science exhibition tomorrow? I thought you were going to catch the bus.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I was, but the road is closed near the centre, so it is not a good idea now.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Could you walk instead? It might be quicker.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I checked, but I have a large project to carry. I'm taking the underground because the station is next to the building.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That makes sense. When will you arrive?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Just before ten. I will send you a message when I get there, and we can meet near the entrance.

items.question: How will the speaker get to the science exhibition?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses this way of travelling because the station is next to the building.

items.context: You hear two people talking about work at the library.
items.audio_script: Man: What are you doing at the library this afternoon? I thought you had to fix computers. || Boy: That was yesterday. Someone else has already done it this morning. || Man: So are you going to read to children instead? || Boy: No, because that activity starts tomorrow. The manager said [7]my job today is to put returned books away[/7]. || Man: That sounds manageable. Will you finish by five? || Boy: I hope so. If it stays quiet, I should finish early and have time to meet my friends afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What are you doing at the library this afternoon? I thought you had to fix computers.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That was yesterday. Someone else has already done it this morning.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: So are you going to read to children instead?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: No, because that activity starts tomorrow. The manager said my job today is to put returned books away.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds manageable. Will you finish by five?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I hope so. If it stays quiet, I should finish early and have time to meet my friends afterwards.

items.question: What job will the speaker do?
items.explanation: The speaker says their job today is to put returned books away.
